values.description: Base URL of the running Blockchain Simulator node
Versioned API root. All v1 endpoints use this prefix.
URL of a second node instance for peer registration and consensus tests
Default sender account identifier for transaction requests
Default receiver account identifier for transaction requests
Default transfer amount. Must be a positive number.
Auto-set by the Mine Block request. Holds the index of the most recently mined block.
Auto-set by the Mine Block request. Holds the proof of the most recently mined block.
Auto-set by the Get Chain request. Holds the current chain length.
Auto-set by the Get Pending Transactions request.
Auto-set by the Validate Chain request. Boolean string.
Auto-set by the Resolve Consensus request. true if chain was replaced.
